summary: Code review and UI testing of bug fixes MINOR-07, MINOR-08, MINOR-09, MINOR-10, MINOR-11, MINOR-12, and SHAP chart colors. All bug fixes verified through code review. UI testing confirmed: (1) Login works, (2) Navigation works, (3) Leaderboard shows 33 models with baseline filtered out (MINOR-10 PASS), (4) Compare tab shows 'No Models to Compare' when no models selected, (5) What-If shows 'Train a Model First' when no model trained. Session persistence issues prevented full end-to-end testing but code implementations are correct.

success_rate.backend: N/A - No backend changes to test

context_for_next_testing_agent: All bug fixes verified through code review. Session persistence issues prevented full UI testing but code implementations are correct. UI testing confirmed: Login works, Navigation works, Leaderboard shows 33 models with baseline filtered out. To fully test MINOR-07 (negative R² warning), train models with Auto algorithm on Insurance Costs dataset - Decision Tree often produces negative R². To test MINOR-09 (rare categories), load a dataset with rare categorical values and check What-If dropdowns. To test MINOR-12 (preprocessing notice), apply cleaning in Preprocess tab then check Data Explorer.

ui_testing_results.leaderboard: PASS - Shows 33 models, baseline filtered from table (MINOR-10 verified)
ui_testing_results.compare_tab: PARTIAL - Shows 'No Models to Compare' when no models selected, need to select models with negative R² to test MINOR-07
ui_testing_results.whatif_tab: PARTIAL - Shows 'Train a Model First', need trained model to test MINOR-09
ui_testing_results.data_explorer: NOT TESTED - Session reset before reaching this tab
ui_testing_results.explainability: NOT TESTED - Session reset before reaching this tab

MINOR-07.description: Compare tab shows negative R² warning banner
MINOR-07.implementation: Added amber warning card with data-testid='negative-r2-warning' that displays when any regression model has R² < 0. Lists affected model names and explains they perform worse than baseline.
MINOR-07.notes: Warning banner uses AlertTriangle icon, amber styling, and dynamically lists models with negative R²

MINOR-08.description: Tune tab shows 'Keep original model' recommendation when tuning doesn't improve
MINOR-08.implementation: Shows amber recommendation box with data-testid='keep-original-rec' when improvement <= 0
MINOR-08.notes: Displays 'Recommendation: Keep original model' with explanation when tuning doesn't improve score

MINOR-09.description: What-If Analyzer flags rare categories with '(rare)' text
MINOR-09.implementation: Computes categoryFreq and rareThreshold (< 2% occurrence). Appends '(rare)' to dropdown options for infrequent categories in both baseline and modified scenario dropdowns.
MINOR-09.notes: rareThreshold = Math.max(2, totalRows * 0.02) ensures categories appearing in < 2% of rows are flagged

MINOR-10.implementation: Line 37: algorithms filter excludes 'baseline'. Line 42: entries filter excludes baseline algorithm
MINOR-10.notes: Both algorithm list and sorted entries explicitly filter out baseline entries

MINOR-11.description: Deploy tab shows confirm dialog for negative R² models
MINOR-11.implementation: Shows warning text for negative R² models and uses window.confirm() before deploying
MINOR-11.notes: Deploy button has destructive styling for negative R² models and requires confirmation

MINOR-12.description: Data Explorer shows preprocessing notification near correlation heatmap
MINOR-12.implementation: Imports cleaningLog and preprocessLog from context. Computes hasPreprocessing flag. Shows info banner with data-testid='preprocess-correlation-notice' when preprocessing has been applied.
MINOR-12.notes: Blue info banner explains correlation values reflect processed data and may differ from raw dataset

SHAP_SUMMARY_PLOT.description: SHAP Summary Plot colors - pink for positive, cyan for negative
SHAP_SUMMARY_PLOT.implementation: Uses #ec4899 (pink) for positive push bars and #06b6d4 (cyan) for negative pull bars
SHAP_SUMMARY_PLOT.notes: Correct color scheme: pink bars extend right (positive push), cyan bars extend left (negative pull). Legend confirms 'Increases prediction' (pink) and 'Decreases prediction' (cyan)

negative_r2_confirmation.confirmation: window.confirm('This model has a negative R² score and performs poorly. Deploy anyway?')
